ogTitle: South Guyra vs South Kempsey: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Guyra and South Kempsey.
heading: South Guyra vs South Kempsey — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Guyra, New South Wales and South Kempsey, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Kempsey has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to South Guyra (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Guyra or South Kempsey safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Guyra has a flood risk score of 54/100, while South Kempsey scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Guyra scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. South Kempsey scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Guyra or South Kempsey?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Kempsey has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
